channel.title: The-Atlantic on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in The-Atlantic on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: The Confidence Gap
item.description:
Job #1. Try to instill confidence in my girls…

Success, it turns out, correlates just as closely with confidence as it does with competence.

Read the full article herePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: Addicted to Your iPhone? You’re Not Alone – The Atlantic
